findings.description: R-022 spec mentions canonical provenance comment in /creview Effective Intensity section — not added. Comment belongs outside section boundary to avoid breaking verbatim identity.
findings.instance_fix: Add markdown comment before ## Effective Intensity in /creview only
findings.class_fix: Add test assertion checking canonical comment exists in /creview

findings.description: Verbatim text uses /creview-specific language ('before starting the review', 'The review still runs') in all 6 skills. Design consequence of R-022 verbatim requirement.
findings.class_fix: Consider updating canonical text to skill-agnostic language in future spec

findings.description: Body reference tests could theoretically match table rows instead of body content. Current patterns are selective enough in practice.
findings.class_fix: For higher confidence, extract body text only before grepping

findings.description: Intensity-aware subsections placed inside Progress Visibility/Behavior as ### subsections. Consistent across skills, not a spec violation.
